---
name: Feature Implementation
about: Implement a feature from the roadmap
labels: enhancement
---

## Context
<!--
Which Milestone does this issue belong to?
What role does this feature play in the overall architecture?
What are the prerequisite issues? Which existing modules are related?
-->

## Prerequisites
<!--
Files the agent should read before starting:
- CLAUDE.md (auto-loaded)
- docs/xxx.md (relevant design document)
- internal/xxx/xxx.go (reference implementation or interface dependency)
-->

## Task Description
<!--
What exactly needs to be implemented. Use clear, unambiguous language.
Include key data structures, algorithms, or protocol details.
-->

## Files to Create/Modify
<!--
List every file to create or modify, and what each should contain:
- Create `internal/xxx/xxx.go` — (describe contents)
- Modify `internal/xxx/xxx.go` — (describe the change)
- Create `internal/xxx/xxx_test.go` — (describe test coverage)
-->

## Interface Contracts
<!--
If this involves new interfaces or modifying existing ones, write out
the full Go interface definition.
If implementing an existing interface, reference the file path where
it is defined.
-->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!--
- [ ] Specific, verifiable conditions (no vague descriptions)
- [ ] Test requirements
- [ ] Performance requirements (if any)
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
-->

## Out of Scope
<!--
Explicitly list what NOT to do. Prevents agent from over-engineering.
-->

## References
<!--
Related docs, external API documentation links, reference implementations.
-->
